sections.paragraph:
Original: מוּשׁ

Transliteration: mûsh

Phonetic: moosh

BDB Definition:

  1. to depart, remove
    1. (Qal)
      1. to depart
      2. to remove
      3. to be removed (of inanimate objects)
    2. (Hiphil) to remove, depart

Origin: a primitive root [perhaps rather the same as H4184 through the idea of receding by contact]

TWOT entry: 1167

Part(s) of speech: Verb
